chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2154 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7907/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.12.2024 Mr. Ather Hussain Abro, Advocate for the petitioner Agha Ather Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State SIP Gulzar Ahmed Abro on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and ASI Nawab Ali of PS Gambat, Investigating Officer >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that due to settlement between the parties outside the Court, he under instructions does not wish to press the instant petition along with pending application, which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
